prompt: I want to learn how to fine tune an LLM on my local computer. Teach me how.

assertions.text: diataxis.toml exists with topics covering dataset prep, training, and evaluation
At least 2 marimo exercise notebooks exist
Tutorials include concrete code examples (not pseudocode)
Exercise notebooks are valid marimo format (contain marimo.App or @app.cell patterns)
Content mentions specific tools (transformers, LoRA/QLoRA, unsloth, PEFT, etc.)
All 4 quadrant types have at least one file
Exercises include interactive widgets (sliders, dropdowns, or code editors)
How-to guides address practical problems (OOM errors, hyperparameter tuning, etc.)
